name: Italian Chicken Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3 1/2 to 6 quart crockery cooker, place cabbage wedges, onion and mushrooms.
2. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
3. Place frozen chicken pieces atop the vegetables.
4. Pour spaghetti sauce over the chicken.
5. Cover; cook on low-heat setting for 10 to 12 hours.
6. Transfer to a serving platter.
7. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
